name: GM Opening Tree
description: A private chess brain workspace with opening editing, game analysis, position vault, training, repair loops, goals, reminders, books, and support cards.

shortcuts.name: Move Editor
shortcuts.description: Open the live board and move editor workspace.

shortcuts.name: Game Analysis Studio
shortcuts.description: Import a PGN, replay your games, and extract lessons.

shortcuts.name: Position Vault
shortcuts.description: Review the saved positions extracted from your study work.

shortcuts.name: Repair Loop
shortcuts.description: Review and update your mistake-to-lesson repair queue.

shortcuts.name: Support Hub
shortcuts.description: Open goals, reminders, books, and support cards.
